optoICC.registers.icc_registers.ICCDeviceTemperatureManager Class Reference

Detailed Description

    Device Functionality - Device Temperature Readout
    System ID: 0x22

    +---------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+------------------------------------------+
    | Register Name       | Id   | Type        | Unit | Range | Default | Comment                                  |
    +=====================+======+=============+======+=======+=========+==========================================+
    |device_temperature   | 0x00 |uint 32-bit  |°C    |       |         |                                          |
    +---------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+------------------------------------------+
    |device_temp_threshold| 0x01 |uint 32-bit  |°C    |       |         |                                          |
    +---------------------+------+-------------+------+-------+---------+------------------------------------------+

Member Function Documentation

◆ GetDeviceTemperature()

optoICC.registers.icc_registers.ICCDeviceTemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperature ( self)

Gets temperature of the device connected to this channel.

◆ GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()

optoICC.registers.icc_registers.ICCDeviceTemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold ( self)

Gets temperature threshold of the device connected to this channel.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again.

◆ help()

optoICC.registers.icc_registers.ICCDeviceTemperatureManager.help ( )
static

◆ SetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()

optoICC.registers.icc_registers.ICCDeviceTemperatureManager.SetDeviceTemperatureThreshold ( self,
threshold = 0 )

Sets temperature threshold of the device connected to this channel.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again.
